headline: Meta launches affordable AI smart glasses at $299 price point
body: Meta released a new line of AI-enabled smart glasses with an entry price of $299, significantly lowering the barrier to consumer adoption of wearable AI technology. For healthcare organizations, this price accessibility matters because it accelerates the timeline for clinical integration of AR-based solutions, from surgical guidance to patient education and remote consultations. The lower cost removes a major obstacle that has prevented healthcare systems from piloting smart glasses in workflows, potentially reshaping how clinicians interact with EHR data and real-time clinical decision support at the point of care. As the wearable AI market expands through price competition, healthcare vendors will need to evaluate how to build or integrate applications that leverage these increasingly accessible devices to drive value-based care outcomes.
